description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mono:latest Docker image and defines three stages: build, test, and deploy, with a global before_script executing `nuget restore -NonInteractive` for every job. In the test stage add a `debug` job that runs `msbuild /p:Configuration="Debug" /p:Platform="Any CPU" /p:OutputPath="./../../build/debug/" "MyProject.sln"` and then `mono packages/NUnit.ConsoleRunner.3.6.0/tools/nunit3-console.exe build/debug/MyProject.Test.dll`. In the deploy stage add a `release` job that runs `msbuild /p:Configuration="Release" /p:Platform="Any CPU" /p:OutputPath="./../../build/release/" "MyProject.sln"`, publishes the file `build/release/MyProject.exe` as an artifact, and is configured to run only on the `master` branch.
